props.name: animation
props.description: Enables or disables the CSS fade transition for the React Tooltip.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds a custom class name to the React Tooltip container. Useful for overriding default styles or applying additional design choices.

props.name: container
props.type: Element | DocumentFragment | (() => Element | DocumentFragment | null) | null | undefined
props.description:
Appends the React Tooltip to a specific element instead of the default `document.body`. You may pass:
- A DOM element (`HTMLElement` or `DocumentFragment`)
- A function that returns a single element
- `null`

props.name: content
props.description: Content to be displayed within the React Tooltip. Can be a string or any valid React node.

props.name: delay
props.type: number | { show: number; hide: number; } | undefined
props.description:
The delay (in milliseconds) before showing or hiding the React Tooltip.
- If provided as a number, the delay is applied to both "show" and "hide".
- If provided as an object, it should have distinct "show" and "hide" values.

props.name: fallbackPlacements
props.description: Array of fallback placements for the React Tooltip to use when the preferred placement cannot be achieved. These placements are tried in order.

props.name: offset
props.description: Adjusts the offset of the React Tooltip relative to its target. Expects a tuple `[x-axis, y-axis]`.

props.name: onHide
props.description: Callback fired immediately after the React Tooltip is hidden.

props.name: onShow
props.description: Callback fired immediately after the React Tooltip is shown.

props.name: placement
props.description: Initial placement of the React Tooltip. Note that Popper.js modifiers may alter this placement automatically if there's insufficient space in the chosen position.

props.name: popperConfig
props.description: Customize the Popper.js configuration used to position the React Tooltip. Pass either an object or a function returning a modified config. [Learn more](https://popper.js.org/docs/v2/constructors/#options)

props.name: trigger
props.description: Determines the events that toggle the visibility of the React Tooltip. Can be a single trigger or an array of triggers.

props.name: visible
props.description:
Controls the visibility of the React Tooltip.
- `true` to show the tooltip.
- `false` to hide the tooltip.
